ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was created */,
  "tweet_content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the person who tweeted */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets the tweet has received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the tweet has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the tweet has received */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to post the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the tweet is a retweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag entry */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated tweet */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag used in the tweet */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the hashtag */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hashtag was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on Twitter */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has on Twitter */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's account was created */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user is verified */,
  "user_profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
